rationale: The citing paper examines discounting for both gains and losses (including willingness to pay to defer debts), while the cited paper is about boundaries of loss aversion and WTA/WTP, so a substantive theoretical link is plausible. However, the provided evidence includes only a DOI-level match with no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not explicitly indicate this source is central to its framing or methods. Given this mixed but limited evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
